payload.answer: I did not store this as durable memory because it conflicts with existing memory: Sara is recorded as your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify whether this is a different Sara or whether the earlier relationship was incorrect.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input names 'Sara' but conflicts with an existing close-family relationship. This may be the same person with contradictory roles, or a different person who shares the same name.

details: Conflict detected between existing and incoming family-role assertions.
Clarification required before resolving entity identity or relationship.

repair_options: Ask whether this is the same Sara as the existing memory.
If it is a different person, create a separate Sara entity with distinguishing context.
If the earlier memory was wrong, explicitly replace 'daughter' with 'niece' for Sara.
If both relationships are somehow true, store the qualifying context that explains how.
